description: Stop staring at blank drywall. We use advanced generative design to map breathtaking, mathematically perfect mandalas onto your space—brought to life entirely by hand by local master artists.

partners.title: We partner with architects, interior designers, and curators.
partners.subtitle: We help harmonize, design, and install.

about.title: About Us
about.headline: We're not a traditional art studio. We're a premium agency where engineers and master artists use Generative AI to design mathematically perfect sacred geometry mandalas, executing them directly onto your walls by hand with flawless precision.

stats.label: Hand-Painted Detail
stats.description: Every mandala is drawn and painted by hand directly onto your wall, integrating pure gold leaf and rich metallic textures.

stats.label: AI Spatial Rendering
stats.description: Upload a photo of your wall, choose a reference, and see custom sacred geometry painted onto your wall in seconds.

stats.label: Bespoke Murals
stats.description: Commissioned wall-painted murals enhancing luxury residences, wellness retreats, and hotels globally.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From vector design sketch to architectural wall installation.
services.description: Bespoke hand-painted murals, gold leaf textures, sacred geometry design, and instant AI wall previews. Everything is mathematically aligned, designed in-house, and painted with expert precision.

list.title: Custom Concepting
list.description: Bespoke geometric layouts engineered for your space. Traditional symbolism, floral filigree, and customized styling parameters.

list.title: Live Room Prototyping
list.description: Upload a photo of your empty wall. Our perspective mapping software overlays the digital mandala onto your room so you see the final look instantly.

list.title: AI-Driven Generation
list.description: We use state-of-the-art generative models to instantly iterate through endless variations of complexity, fine lines, and dot-work.

list.title: Premium Hand-Painting
list.description: Our vetted network of local master painters interprets the digital blueprint into an organic, hand-crafted masterpiece using washable acrylics.

list.title: Texture & Metallic Finishes
list.description: Elevate the artwork with premium gold-leafing, structural texturing, or metallic paints that catch the light beautifully.

list.title: Commercial Spaces Scaling
list.description: Tailored, high-impact branding visuals for cafes, hotel lobbies, corporate backdrops, and modern wellness centers.

process.title: How We Work
process.headline: From brief to masterpiece in weeks.
process.description: A precise, math-driven artistic journey. Combining advanced spatial analysis with meticulous craftsmanship.

list.title: Align
list.description: One short brief to lock in your theme, color choices, and exact wall measurements.

list.title: AI Design Sprint
list.description: Our engine generates highly detailed mandala mockups mapped over photos of your actual room in days, eliminating all guesswork.

list.title: Hand-Coded Blueprint
list.description: We convert the digital design into high-resolution mapping coordinates for our artists, guaranteeing absolute mathematical symmetry.

list.title: Freehand Execution
list.description: Our local master painters step in, bringing the canvas to life on-site with clean linework and meticulous detail.

list.title: Seal & Protect
list.description: We apply a protective matte varnish coating to ensure your handmade mural remains vibrant, scratch-resistant, and entirely washable for years.

gallery.subtitle: CURATED COLLECTION
gallery.title: Sacred spaces globally.
gallery.text: 120+ masterpieces. Preview your dream design painted on your wall instantly with our advanced spatial AI, then hand-painted directly onto your wall.

cta.topText: Your custom masterpiece is 4 weeks away.
cta.description: Upload a photo of your wall. Our Spatial AI will instantly paint and render a breathtaking custom mandala on it, followed by physical curation by our master artisans.

footer.bio: A specialized studio combining sacred geometry and advanced Spatial AI with hand-painted mastery. Custom hand-painted murals and textured gold leaf mandalas painted directly onto extraordinary walls.
footer.newsletterDescription: Updates on new work, thinking, and what we're shipping next.

aboutPage.subtitle: ABOUT US
aboutPage.description: A boutique spatial art agency closing the gap between generative algorithm and master craftsmanship. Sacred geometry, pure gold leaf, and structural fine-art murals—designed with AI precision, painted entirely by hand.

manifesto.subtitle: OUR MANIFESTO
manifesto.p1: Most walls are built to divide. We founded The Accent Wall Agency to do the opposite — engineer breathtaking
manifesto.p4: . Every complex center, every expanding circle, every fine line is designed by algorithms to collapse the distance between your

stats.label: Industrial vinyl prints or stickers used

cards.title: Drawn on Paper
cards.description: Every bespoke mandala begins as an organic idea. We draw the initial geometric patterns by hand on physical paper, capturing raw artistic inspiration in its purest state.

cards.title: Algorithmic Symmetry
cards.description: We upload the drawing to our spatial AI. Our perspective-mapping network overlays the geometry precisely onto your wall, showing you the exact layout scale in real-time.

cards.title: Hand-Painted Soul
cards.description: No industrial machines or projections. Our master muralists spend days painting every concentric circle and gold-leaf line entirely by hand, bringing the artwork to life.

cards.title: Complete Design Vibe
cards.description: We don't just paint a wall—we elevate the entire room's energy. Our mandalas are designed to harmonize with your lighting, furniture, and interior textures, creating a cohesive, soulful spatial vibe.

studioPage.subtitle: THE STUDIO
studioPage.title: Opening Soon
studioPage.description: We are engineering our physical and digital generative art showroom — where algorithms, spatial AI, and golden hand-painted mandalas come together. A sacred geometry experience opening soon in the heart of the city.
